title: Valkreate
description: Build moving factories, floating airships and interactable contraptions with this incredible modpack!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ae002b2c6e8ce6bb86ddf94612cd36cfd746a69.png)

Embark on a journey in moving bases, floating factories, and sailing homes with Valkreate!

Valkreate combines the intuitive power of create with the magic of Valkyrien Skies and a variety of other mods, such as Supplementaries, Valkyrien Pirates and Immersive Armors.

Perfect for waging wars on your friends, buildiing giant floating bases, or reaching peak efficiency!


<details>
<summary>Bugs</summary>

Be aware of the following:

- The search bar in Creative mode does not work.
- Interacting with the cannon from Supplementaries will almost certainly cause a crash due to how Valkyrien Skies renders things, so use other cannons instead (there's definitely enough of them)
- Particles, including rain, fall straight through the blocks in ships. This is due to how they interact with the Valkyrien Skies mod, and there's little that can be done to fix it from my side.

  Please send in any other bugs, on my discord server [here](https://discord.gg/FbwvjXqH).

</details>
